zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich von Saarbrücken於1095年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀波斯朋海姆時，他的父親Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau35歲，母親Wiltrude von Calw50歲。他和Gisèle de Lorraine至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1135年在德國海藍-普法爾茲海-斯盧可-可萊斯萊寧根享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Friedrich von Saarbrücken于1095年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀波斯朋海姆时，他的父亲Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau35岁，母亲Wiltrude von Calw50岁。他和Gisèle de Lorraine至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1135年在德国海藍-普法爾茲海-斯盧可-可萊斯萊寧根享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich von Saarbrücken was born in 1095, in Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau, was 35 and his mother, Wiltrude von Calw, was 50. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Gisèle de Lorraine. He died in 1135, in Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich von Saarbrücken est né en 1095, à Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Wiltrude von Calw, avait 50 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Gisèle de Lorraine. Il est décédé en 1135, à Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich von Saarbrücken 1095 in Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau 35 und seine Mutter Wiltrude von Calw 50. Er hatte mit Gisèle de Lorraine mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1135 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich von Saarbrücken è nato il nel 1095 nel Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Wiltrude von Calw, aveva 50 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Gisèle de Lorraine. Morì nel 1135, nel Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Friedrich von Saarbrückenが1095年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズバド クレウズナチブルグスプオンヘイムで生まれた時，父Sigebert I. Graf im Saargauは35歳，母Wiltrude von Calwは50歳であった。彼はGisèle de Lorraineとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1135年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズルヘイン-ハンスルuク-クレイスレイニンジェンで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich von Saarbrücken(이)가 1095년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 바드 크레우즈나치 버그스폰하임에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Wiltrude von Calw(은)는 50세였다. 그는 Gisèle de Lorraine(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1135년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 리이-헌스uck-크레이스 레이닝에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich von Saarbrücken nasceu em 1095, em Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Wiltrude von Calw, tinha 50 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Gisèle de Lorraine. Ele faleceu em 1135, em Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich von Saarbrücken родился в 1095 г. в местности бургспоним, бад креузнач, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Wiltrude von Calw, 50. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Gisèle de Lorraine. Он умер в 1135 г. в местности лининген, раин-хунсрuкк-крис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Friedrich von Saarbrücken nació en 1095, en Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Sigebert I. Graf im Saargau, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Wiltrude von Calw, tenía 50 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Gisèle de Lorraine. Murió en 1135, en Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 40 años.
